== Notes for [[Item:Q57587|Q57587]] ==

In image 15 of his probanza de hidalguia it says that his father was Diego de Santa Cruz who was a resident of Anthwerp, Flanders http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/show/368464. Pedro de Santa Cruz could have been born in Anthwerp as well or in Burgos, his father's birth town.

Diego de Santa Cruz Salamanca was consul of the Spanish Nation of merchants in Anthwerp in 1531 and 1536. https://repository.ubn.ru.nl/bitstream/handle/2066/146233/mmubn000001_231239688.pdf Page 465

According to this probanza in 1590 he was 45 years old and had resided in Puebla de los Angeles for some years already. He married the daughter of conquistador Diego de Holguin and granddaughter of conquistador Garci Hernandez http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/description/123070

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-41091-AGI10/type/fa/id/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526/unitid/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526+-+ES-41091-AGI-UD-368464/search/0/Polanco

Some genealogists have erroneously assumed that Pedro de Santa Cruz Polanco was the son of conquistador Francisco de Santa Cruz Polanco due to similarities of last names. However conquistador Francisco de Santa Cruz only had 3 sons: Diego, Alvaro and Feliciano de Santa Cruz and three daughters Catalina Polanco Santa Cruz, Francisca Santa Cruz and Estefania Velasco which every source agrees on. None of his sons married nor left descendance and all the encomiendas that belonged to the family returned to the crown by 1600 after their deaths. (Robert Himmerich "[https://books.google.se/books?id=Pz9NCgAAQBAJ&pg=PA241&lpg=PA241&dq=francisco+de+santa+cruz+catalina+salamanca&source=bl&ots=9oBjQrd2-H&sig=5fL8JWEKS0X7OEWBuFeXdP_MTxA&hl=en&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjZsoCRoOPeAhVMkiwKHYEEDCcQ6AEwBXoECAAQAQ#v=onepage&q=francisco%20de%20santa%20cruz%20catalina%20salamanca&f=false The Encomenderos of New Spain, 1521-1555]" page 241



He might have had three brothers who resided in Peru (Francisco, Diego and Carlos Santa Cruz Salamanca) http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/description/90064

A Diego de Santa Cruz appears as brother of a Francisco de Santa Cruz here http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/description/237400

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
